channel.title: Cariboo Signals: Deep Dives
channel.description: Long-form debate episodes on weighty topics — politics, philosophy, economics, technology. Hosted by Morgan (empiricist) and Sable (systems thinker). Each episode is built from curated sources and auto-expanded with credible coverage.
channel.itunes:author: Morgan and Sable
channel.itunes:summary: Long-form debate episodes on weighty topics — politics, philosophy, economics, technology. Hosted by Morgan (empiricist) and Sable (systems thinker). Each episode is built from curated sources and auto-expanded with credible coverage.

item.title: Mental Health Vs Security: Discussion of mental-health-vs-security
item.description:
Topic: Mental Health Vs Security

Central question: Discussion of mental-health-vs-security

Curated sources:
HealthIM tool helps RCMP respond to mental health crises in East Kootenay : My East Kootenay Now
150 people died in B.C. in January from toxic drugs: Coroner - Williams Lake Tribune
Williams Lake city councillor to propose "aggressive" motion for public safety : My Cariboo Now

Additional sources consulted:
1 The use and impact of surveillance-based technology initiatives in
The use and impact of surveillance-based technology initiatives in inpatient and acute mental health settings: a systematic review - King's College London
Exploring the Impact of Security Technologies on Mental Health: A Comprehensive Review - PMC
The Dangers of Surveillance - Harvard Law Review
(PDF) Correction: The use and impact of surveillance-based technology initiatives in inpatient and acute mental health settings: a systematic review

Generated by Claude (Anthropic) · Audio by OpenAI TTS · Sources via Brave Search · CC BY-NC 4.0

item.title: Aging_Genx: Discussion of aging_genx
item.description:
Topic: Aging_Genx

Central question: Discussion of aging_genx

Curated sources:
I was laid off in my 60s and can't find a job after 11 months. I wish I could retire, but I can't afford it.
Many workers and bosses agree there
Whole-Person Mental Health: Care, Choice, Community, and Combatting Populism

Additional sources consulted:
With fewer safety nets, 'robbed' Gen X is facing a retirement crisis, top advisor says
The Gen X Retirement Gap: Challenges, Strategies & Timely Solutions - Articles - Advisor Perspectives
Retirement Challenges Facing Gen-X - PEAK 65® ERA
The ‘Forgotten Generation’ Faces a Retirement Crisis—Here’s the Way Forward
Gen X retirement insights from Corebridge Financial

Generated by Claude (Anthropic) · Audio by OpenAI TTS · Sources via Brave Search · CC BY-NC 4.0
